info.title: GL.iNet Router 4.x API — ovpn_client module
info.description: All methods in this module are undocumented — discovered by static analysis of the GL.iNet web UI bundles. See `x-source` on each method for evidence origin. JSON-RPC 2.0 API exposed at POST /rpc on GL.iNet routers. All methods use JSON-RPC method `call` with params = [sid, module, function, args?].
